title: Our Services
description: We are a community dedicated to networking between native and diaspora Malagasy in Germany. A platform for exchange and sharing to foster mutual support among young expats from Madagascar.
communityDescription: Connect with other Malagasy in Germany and build lasting bonds within our community.
opportunitiesDescription: Find job and training opportunities tailored to your profile and professional ambitions.
housingDescription: Share and find housing easily through our trusted network within the community.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Creating a bridge between Malagasy living in Germany and those who stayed home, facilitating integration and the sharing of experiences.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: Becoming the go-to reference for the Malagasy community in Germany, a space for mutual support and growth.

values.title: Values
values.description: Solidarity, sharing and mutual aid. The strength of the community to overcome the challenges of expatriation together.

commitment.title: Commitment
commitment.description: Offering a practical solution to facilitate the fulfilment of each member, by simplifying daily life and opening up opportunities.

identity.title: Identity
identity.description: Preserving and celebrating Malagasy culture while embracing German diversity, to proudly represent our country.
